message:
fix(core): resume draining FilteredEventStream after Lagged error

Previously, a Lagged recv error was treated as stream-closed, causing
subscribers that fell behind to permanently stop receiving events.
Now the stream continues draining from the new cursor position after
lag, allowing recovery without reconnection. Add test verifying
stream drains past lagged marker to deliver latest retained event.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
